title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Beast Pirates, Sanji as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they've come for more, I'll give them as much as they can handle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, not that. These people know who we are.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Flying Fighters are here! To kill the SOBA merchant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: two of them, Drake and page one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why'd they call us, speci- fically?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And why are you here, Hawkins?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: For show, right? That's always important.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I came here in pursuit of a specific man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you have something you hunt that's more important to you than this mission, eh, Drake?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 15 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
